auth.enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access the assembly dashboard.
auth.enterDetails: Enter your details below to create your account and get started.

home.heroDesc: Take full control of your hardware production. Track components, design multi-level BOMs, and calculate live assembly capacity — all in one place.
home.orbitDesc: Tap any part to see how AMS manages it — from stock levels to assembly capacity.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to ship faster
home.featuresDesc: Four powerful tools, one unified platform — built for hardware teams of every size.
home.f1Desc: Define products with unlimited component depth. Your entire catalog, structured and searchable.
home.f2Desc: Monitor workshop and storage stock in real time. Get alerted before you run out — not after.
home.f3Desc: Generate instant BOM reports, shortage summaries, and cost-of-goods data on demand.
home.f4Desc: Admins control orders and inventory. Users browse, order, and track — all with secure auth.
home.stepsTitle: Up and running in three steps
home.stepsDesc: No onboarding calls. No complex setup. Just log in and start managing.
home.step1Desc: Enter your raw parts — CPUs, resistors, frames, batteries — into the AMS inventory. Assign them to your workshop or storage locations.
home.step2Desc: Define which components go into each finished product. Create hierarchical BOMs that reflect exactly how your hardware is assembled.
home.step3Desc: AMS tells you instantly how many units you can build. Users place orders; admins confirm them and stock adjusts automatically.
home.testiDesc: From startups to workshops — AMS helps teams eliminate waste and build with confidence.
home.ctaTitle1: Ready to take control of your
home.ctaDesc: Join manufacturing teams who have eliminated stock-outs, reduced errors, and started shipping faster with AMS.

menu.productsDesc: Select an option to manage products.
menu.componentsDesc: Select an option to manage components.
menu.stockDesc: Select an option to manage stock.
menu.assemblyDesc: Select an option to manage assembly operations.
menu.reportsDesc: Select a report to generate and view.
